# Project Buildup History: India Budget 2020 Economic Analysis

- Repository: `india-budget-2020-economic-analysis`
- Category: `data_science`
- Subtype: `analysis`
- Source: `project_buildup_2021_2025_daily_plan.csv`
## 2021-04-02 - Day 1: Question framing start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what India Budget 2020 Economic Analysis should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write down the analysis question and what decision India Budget 2020 Economic Analysis should support so the project had a decent base. This was still the messy setup part where I was opening files, checking examples, and trying not to overthink it too early. Most of the progress here came from patient cleanup more than anything flashy.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had analysis objective written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. It was not super polished, just stable enough that I felt okay moving forward.
